case_title: FELICIANO, JULIO VS SBC IP COMMUNICATIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY FELICIANO, JULIO AS TO DEFENDANT SBC IP COMMUNICATIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO CT CORPORATION AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR RECEIPT OFPROCESS FOR SBC COMMUNICATION RETURNED SIGNED
CORRESPONDENCE FROM CT CORPORATION FILED--NOT THE REGISTERED AGENT FOR SBC COMMUNICATIONS INC
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-30-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-24-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLAINTIFF AMENDED THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SENT A COPY OF THE NEW AMENDED CLAIM VIA CERTIFIED MAIL WITH A NEW DATE TO THE AGENT
CERT MAIL SENT TO CT CORPORATION SYSTEMS AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR SBC IP COMMUNICATIONS, INC RETURNED SIGNED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-30-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-28-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $606.61. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELICIANO, JULIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SBC IP COMMUNICATIONS, INC. $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $642.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF NEVER RECEIVED SETTLEMENT AMOUNT FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
